title: clematis mollissima
intro: Clematis mollissima is a type of flowering plant in the Clematis genus, commonly known as the Sweet Clematis or Chinese Clematis. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clematis mollissima include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of the common cold, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Clematis mollissima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
